subject: Write Generic Agent Skills file generation section
description:
Write the skill section that generates complete Generic Agent Skills (agentskills.io) format skill files from the approved outline.

Following the same pattern established in the OpenCode generation section:

1. **Platform-native rendering** — Generate a complete GAS skill file that:
   - Conforms to agentskills.io specification format
   - Uses GAS conventions and idioms
   - Includes all required frontmatter fields
   - Structures content following GAS section layout
   - Supports skills of any complexity

2. **Content mapping** — Map interview/outline data to GAS format:
   - Skill name → GAS name field
   - Description → GAS description field
   - Features → Appropriate GAS sections
   - Portability considerations → GAS-specific portability fields
   - Tool integrations → GAS tool declaration format

3. **GAS-specific features** — Leverage GAS capabilities:
   - Portability across agent implementations
   - Standard section structure
   - Tool and MCP integration patterns

Uses the same output path handling written in Phase 1.

**Acceptance Criteria:**

_Functional:_
- [ ] Generates complete, valid GAS skill file
- [ ] Output follows agentskills.io conventions and idioms
- [ ] All required frontmatter fields included
- [ ] Supports simple and complex skill types
- [ ] Reuses output path handling from Phase 1

_Edge Cases:_
- [ ] Skills with tool integrations generate proper GAS tool declarations
- [ ] Very complex multi-step skills generate cleanly

_Error Handling:_
- [ ] Generation failure reported with actionable details

**Testing Requirements:**
• Manual: Generate GAS skill and validate against agentskills.io specification
• Manual: Generate both simple and complex GAS skills
• Manual: Compare GAS output quality to OpenCode output

Source: internal/specs/create-skill-SPEC.md Section 9.2
activeForm: Writing Generic Agent Skills file generation section
